title: Create a document with parent linkage
description: A project owner or AI tool creates a new RCF document and the tool maintains the parent linkage automatically.
iWant: to create a new RCF document and have its parent linkage maintained
soThat: the tree stays consistent without me editing two files by hand

acceptanceCriteria.description: Creating a requirement writes the file and updates the PRD requirementIds list, both validating
acceptanceCriteria.given: a request to create a requirement under a PRD
acceptanceCriteria.then: the requirement file is written and the PRD's requirementIds list gains the new id, both validating

acceptanceCriteria.description: Creating a document with a conflicting id writes nothing and returns a clear conflict error
acceptanceCriteria.given: a request to create a document whose id already exists
acceptanceCriteria.then: no file is written and a clear conflict error is returned

acceptanceCriteria.description: Creating an invalid document writes nothing and returns the validation error
acceptanceCriteria.given: a request to create a document that would not validate
acceptanceCriteria.then: nothing is written and the validation error is returned
